description: Dynamic bridge — 2026-05-03 (Sunday) weekly intelligence | REGIME TRANSITION: DIPLOMATIC_RESTART_SIGNAL | Iran peace proposal via Pakistan → FORECAST_PAT005 active | Brent $118→$108 | GIFT Nifty +0.97%

market_regime.label: GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_EXTREME_DIPLOMATIC_RESTART_SIGNAL_BRENT_COOLING
market_regime.key_risk: Iran passed peace proposal to US via Pakistani mediators (May 1-2). Brent fell $118→$108 (-8.5%) on the signal. FORECAST_PAT005 triggered — 25-30% probability of deal within 48-72h. If deal advances: regime shifts to GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_DE-ESCALATION_TRANSITION. Key Nifty level: 24,400 (50-DMA resistance). BankNifty ECL structural headwind (RBI framework) persists regardless of geopolitical outcome.
market_regime.dominant_risk: (1) Iran peace proposal status — most market-sensitive variable. Trump response/statement over weekend will determine Monday direction. (2) Brent at $108 — cooling from $118 but still above $95 regime-change threshold. Peace deal could push Brent toward $90-95. (3) BankNifty ECL framework headwind — structural, not tactical. (4) FII selling: Rs 59,000 cr net sold in April (10th consecutive month) — structural outflow; any peace deal could trigger reversal.
market_regime.crude_note: Brent fell from $118.03 (April 29 intraday high) to ~$108.17 on May 1 (Iran peace proposal via Pakistani mediators). This is the largest single-day Brent decline since April 8 ceasefire. If peace deal advances, Brent could fall to $95-105. Regime change threshold: $95 sustained 3 days.
market_regime.banknifty_note: BankNifty fell from 55,403 (Apr 29) to 54,863 (Apr 30). ECL framework structural headwind. Support floor at 54,500. Recovery to 55,000-56,000 possible on FORECAST_PAT005 + gap-up Monday. P038 (fails 57,000 by May 5) tracking CORRECT.

iran_peace_proposal.mechanism: Iran passed peace proposal to US through Pakistani mediators
iran_peace_proposal.india_implication: Positive: Brent falling toward regime-change ($95) would benefit all crude-sensitive sectors (MRPL, IndiGo, consumer disc). Negative for defense premium (M012 unwind conditions approaching if Brent falls further). Gold war premium compression.

sp500_ath.india_signal: Global risk-on: positive for EM sentiment, FII pause or reversal possible, short-covering catalyst

key_drivers: GIFT Nifty +0.97% (24,230 vs last close 23,997.55) — Iran peace proposal + S&P ATH
Iran peace proposal via Pakistani mediators — FORECAST_PAT005 fired (25-30% deal probability)
S&P 500 fresh ATH 7,230 on May 1 — global risk-on signal
Brent eased to $108.17 from $118.03 peak — crude-sensitive sectors get relief bid
GIFT Nifty futures open confirmation needed Monday morning (check 06:00 IST)
risks: Trump rejects Iran proposal over weekend → gap-up fades intraday → close 23,900-24,100
FII continue structural selling (9th week) → capping upside at 24,300-24,400
Any fresh escalation news (Israeli military action, Iran counter-measures) → reversal

session_direction.key_assumption: FORECAST_PAT005 (diplomatic restart) drives gap-up. Short-covering adds momentum through morning. 24,400 (50-DMA) is the key resistance — expected to cap intraday high unless FII also turn buyers. Base case: Nifty opens 24,230, tests 24,300-24,380, fades to close 24,100-24,250. P041 (24,300-24,600 by May 12) begins accumulating probability.
session_direction.brent_forecast: $103-112 base case. If peace deal credible → $95-100 possible by May 9. If rejected → $112-120 return.

scenarios.name: PEACE_DEAL_RALLY (35%)
scenarios.description: Iran-US deal advances: Trump accepts proposal framework within 48-72h. Brent falls to $100-105. FII pause/reversal begins. Nifty gaps up, sustains, closes 24,300-24,500. BankNifty reclaims 55,500. Defense stocks (ASTRA MICRO, COCHINSHIP) give back 2-5%.

scenarios.name: GAP_UP_FADE (35%)
scenarios.description: Gap-up on peace proposal but Trump rejects/modifies conditions. Short-covering fades by afternoon. Nifty closes 24,000-24,200. FII selling resumes. Brent recovers to $110-113.

scenarios.name: SUSTAINED_RALLY (20%)
scenarios.description: Trump accepts proposal + global risk-on extends. FII short-covering + DII buying. Nifty clears 24,400 on volume, closes 24,400-24,600. BankNifty breaks 56,000. P041 target in sight by end of week.

scenarios.name: REJECTION_REVERSAL (10%)
scenarios.description: Trump explicitly rejects Iran proposal over weekend/Monday morning. Brent spikes back to $115+. Gap-up reverses to red close. Nifty falls to 23,700-23,900.

ceasefire_binary_matrix.note: Upgraded peace_deal_advancing from 0.30 to 0.35 on Iran peace proposal (May 1-2). This is the strongest diplomatic signal since April 8 ceasefire — Iran proactively offering terms via Pakistan channel. Stalemate maintained at 0.35 (proposal may stall at US conditions). Escalation downgraded from 0.40 to 0.30 (Iran clearly prefers diplomacy over escalation at current oil prices).
